name: Cave Entrance
description: A dark opening in the rock face. Cold air flows out, carrying the smell of damp stone and old bones. The path leads down into the earth.
ambient: Water drips somewhere in the darkness.
The wind whistles through the narrow entrance.

interaction_rules.text: You close your eyes and murmur a quiet prayer. For a heartbeat, the room feels still enough to listen.
Your voice drifts through the area and fades into the distance. No one applauds, but it lifts your spirits.
